creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
On my machine, vlc will fail to compile misc/cpu.c, emitting errors like
this:

misc/cpu.c:129: error: expected '=', ',', ';', 'asm' or '__attribute__' before 'static'

Fix: Use a newer version of GCC.  I actually believe 4.4 or better should work.
How-To-Repeat: Just try and build the port.  I suspect your processor has to support
certain MMX or SSE features.
